task.title: Setting the CICS level for COBOL and PL/I programs
task.shortdesc: You can set the level of CICS in use at your installation to aid more accurate content assistance and syntax checking.

keywords.indexterm: CICSsetting the levellevel and content assistancelevel and syntax checking

taskbody.context:
When you set the level of CICS in use at your installation, you can take advantage of release-specific content assistance and syntax checking for your COBOL and PL/I programs. The product uses the CICS level that you specify to do the following operations:
Set compiler options specific to the release of CICS in use at your installation. These options are used for local syntax checking. This action is available only on Windows.
Provide release-specific content assistance in the z Systems LPEX Editor.

steps.stepsection: To set the level of CICS in use at your installation:

step.cmd: Open COBOL Settings properties or PL/I Settings properties page.
From the list, select the level of CICS.
